summary: Completed testing of 4 bug fixes: (1) Route fix for CinemaJournal navigation - fixed 2 additional places using old /film/ route, (2) Skill battle draw rates reduced per tiered formula, (3) CinePass optimistic update via updateUser in frontend, (4) Poster deduplication by title in backend. All 11 pytest tests PASSED.

bug1_route_fix.details: Found 2 additional places using old /film/ route in CinemaJournal.jsx (lines 186, 222 for News and Virtual Reviews dialogs). Applied fix to use /films/ consistently. Main poster clicks on lines 435, 480, 496 already correctly using /films/.

bug2_skill_battle_draw_rates.details: Tested simulate_skill_battle with 100 simulations each: diff=0 has ~50% draws (expected), diff=1 has <25% draws (was 55%, now 15%), diff=2 has <15% draws (now 5%), diff=3+ has <15% draws (now 5%). Tiered formula working correctly.

bug3_cinepass_optimistic_update.details: Verified ChallengesPage.jsx lines 303-310 call updateUser immediately with cinepass bonus after offline battle win. Backend returns cinepass_reward field. Backend uses 'total_xp' (not 'xp') for $inc operations.

bug4_duplicate_posters.details: Backend /api/films/cinema-journal endpoint deduplicates recent_posters by title. Tested API returns no duplicate titles in recent_posters array. Deduplication logic in server.py lines 4764-4772.

cinepass_api.details: GET /api/challenges/limits returns cinepass_reward_per_win: 2. User cinepass balance visible in navbar (146 CinePass shown).

skill_battle_stronger_team_wins.details: When skill diff is large (8 vs 4), stronger team wins significantly more battles.

fixes_applied_by_tester.CinemaJournal.jsx: Fixed 2 additional places using old /film/{id} route to use /films/{id} - lines 186 (News dialog) and 222 (Virtual Reviews dialog)

success_rate.frontend: Code review passed, donation modal blocked UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified. Skill battle draw rates now use tiered approach: 50%/15%/5% for diff 0/1/2+. CinePass rewards working (backend uses 'total_xp' and 'cinepass' in $inc). Poster deduplication by title implemented. Route fix applied to ALL 5 navigate calls in CinemaJournal.jsx to use /films/ instead of /film/. Donation modal appears after login and blocks some UI testing.

verified_fixes.bug1_route_fix: FIXED - All 5 navigate calls in CinemaJournal.jsx now use /films/{id}
verified_fixes.bug3_cinepass_optimistic_update: VERIFIED - ChallengesPage.jsx line 303-310 calls updateUser with cinepass bonus immediately
verified_fixes.bug4_duplicate_posters: VERIFIED - server.py line 4764-4772 deduplicates recent_posters by title
